release_notes:
- Android Smoothness & Lag Fixes
- 1-Hour Media Auto-Delete
- Media Preview with Captions
- Group Admin Kick Powers
- Editable Group Profiles
- Add Any User to Groups
- Glassmorphism Gallery Redesign
- Advanced Date Grouping for Gallery
- Dynamic Timezone Fix for Reminders
- Save to Gallery & Mapbox sharing toggles
- Unread Notification Badges
- Premium UI Adjustments
